raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Kamehr utt Karfch btja starp
Saula Nammm/ un starp Dah
wida Nammu/ tad stiprinajahs
Abners Saula Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un Sanlam bij leeka See-
wa bjuţi Rizpa Wahra/ wee-
na Meita Aja. Un Jsbofets taz-
zija us Abneru: Rapehz gulli tu
pee maña Tehwa leekas Seewas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Tad apskaitahs Abners
fohti pahr Jsbofeta Wahrdem/
un fazzija: Efmu es tad weena
Sunna-Galwa/ es/ kas es prett
Juhdu pee tawa Tehwa Saula
Namma/ pee winna Bruhteem
un pee winna Draugeem Scheh-
lastibu parahdu? un tew ne ef-
mu Dahwidam Rohkâ dewis/
ka tu schodeen man weenu No-
seegunn kahdas Seewas deht
peelahgadi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Laid Deews Abneram fcha
un ta darra/ ja es ta Dahwidam
ne darrischu/ ka tas KURGS
winnam swehrejs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Pahrzeldams to Walsti-
bu no Saula Namma/ un Dah-
wida Bohda-Krehflu uszeldams
pahr Israëlu un pahr Juhdu/
no Danna lihds Bersebai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tas ne warreja Abne-
ram ne Wahrdnu wairs atbildcht/
ta wiꞥſch par to bihjajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un Abners fuhtija Wehst-
neschus pee Dahwida Jawci Wee-
tá/ un fazzija : Kam ta Semme
peederr? un ( wet,l ) fazzidams:
Darri weenu Derribu ar man/
redsi/ tad buhs manna Rohka ar
tew wiꞥſu Israëlu pee tew atgreest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un tas fazzija: Labbi/e-
darrifchn weenu Derribu ar tew
vet weenu Leetu prafsu es no te-
vis/ fazzidanis: Tew ne buh
mannu Waigu redseht/ pirns t
man Mikali Saula Meitu a-
weddi/ kad tu nahksi mann
Waigu redseht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Ir Dahwids fuhtij
Wehstneschus pee Jsbofeta Sa-
la Dehla/ fazzidams: Dohd ma-
Mikali mannu Geewn / ko
few ar tints Wilisternu Preeks-
Ahdahm efinu prezzejees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un Jsbofets nofuhtija/u-
rehine to no ta Wihra/ no Pa-
tiëla Läita Dehla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un winnas Wihrs gal-
ar winnu/ eedams un rand-
dams winnat pakkat/ lihds Ba-
kurim. Tad fazzija Abners us t
Eij nohst/ greesees atpakkat. Ta-
greesehs winsch atpakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Un Abners runnaja
Israëta Wezzajeein/ un fazzija
Juhs effat zittkahrt Dahwi-
jums par Rehnissu meklejscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Tad darrajt nu to :
tas KURGS irr us Dahwi-
runnajs/ un fazzijis: Zaur ma-
na Kalpa Dahwida Rohku isp-
stischu es manmus Landis Isr-
eka no to Wilisternu Rohkas/
no wiꞥſu winnu Cenaidnee
Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Ta patt runnaja Abne-
preeksch Benjaminna Ansim /
Abners nogahje arri preeks-
Dahwida Ansim runnaht
orona wiﬀu/ tas Israëtam
wiﬀa
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
